name: Nimura Furuta
description:
__Height:__ 175 cm
~!__RC Type:__ Rinkaku!~

~!Kichimura Washuu is the primary antagonist of the Tokyo Ghoul series and the former Bureau Director of the CCG. He is involved in numerous organizations and is responsible for several major events of the series.!~

~!He was originally the illegitimate son of former CCG Chairman Tsuneyoshi Washuu and an agent of V raised in the Sunlit Garden.

To further his own agenda, he has used various identities to infiltrate organizations or build personal alliances. As a member of the Clowns, he was responsible for the Steel Beam Incident. He also joined the Ghoul Restaurant as __PG__, and has been a partner in Akihiro Kanou's ghoulification experiments. Like [Ken Kaneki](https://anilist.co/character/87275/Ken-Kaneki), he is an artificial one-eyed ghoul who possesses [Rize Kamishiro](https://anilist.co/character/88413/Rize-Kamishiro)'s kagune.!~
